---
title: "Interactive Report: Airway Data"
date: March 27, 2026
bibliography: https://gist.githubusercontent.com/johnsonra/121eb61bf4b09e4258b78e341b1819e9/raw/51d87906d0b5824f9809f667008046665b815649/references.bib
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 800

library(shiny)

# Load the top 2000 DEGs data
degs <- read.csv("https://gist.githubusercontent.com/johnsonra/121eb61bf4b09e4258b78e341b1819e9/raw/9d4d1650713378ce59e06a21b62f940433100a81/top_2000.csv", row.names = 1)

# Prepare data
degs$neg_log10_padj <- -log10(degs$padj)
degs$rank_order <- seq_len(nrow(degs))
degs$A <- log2(degs$rank_order + 1)

ui <- page_fillable(
  layout_sidebar(
    sidebar = sidebar(
      sliderInput(
        "padj_threshold",
        "Adjusted p-value threshold (padj):",
        min = 0.001,
        max = 0.1,
        value = 0.05,
        step = 0.001
      ),
      numericInput(
        "lfc_threshold",
        "Log2 Fold-Change threshold (|log2FC|):",
        value = 1,
        min = -5,
        max = 5,
        step = 0.5
      ),
      hr(),
      verbatimTextOutput("summary_text")
    ),
    navset_card_tab(
      title = "Interactive Airway RNA-seq Analysis",
      nav_panel(
        "Volcano Plot",
        plotOutput("volcano_plot", height = "600px")
      ),
      nav_panel(
        "MA Plot",
        plotOutput("ma_plot", height = "600px")
      ),
      nav_panel(
        "Summary Table",
        tableOutput("summary_table")
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Create filtered data based on thresholds
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data.frame(
      degs,
      significant = degs$padj < input$padj_threshold & abs(degs$log2FoldChange) > input$lfc_threshold,
      direction = ifelse(
        degs$padj < input$padj_threshold & abs(degs$log2FoldChange) > input$lfc_threshold,
        ifelse(degs$log2FoldChange > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
        "Not Significant"
      )
    )
  })
  
  # Volcano plot
  output$volcano_plot <- renderPlot({
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    # Set colors
    colors <- ifelse(data$direction == "Upregulated", "#e74c3c",
                     ifelse(data$direction == "Downregulated", "#3498db", "#bdc3c7"))
    
    plot(
      data$log2FoldChange,
      data$neg_log10_padj,
      col = colors,
      pch = 16,
      alpha = 0.6,
      main = paste(
        "Volcano Plot\n",
        "padj threshold:", input$padj_threshold,
        "| log2FC threshold:", input$lfc_threshold
      ),
      xlab = "log2(Fold Change)",
      ylab = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
      cex.main = 1.2,
      cex.lab = 1.1,
      cex = 1.5
    )
    
    # Add threshold lines
    abline(h = -log10(input$padj_threshold), col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
    abline(v = c(-input$lfc_threshold, input$lfc_threshold), col = "blue", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
    abline(v = 0, col = "gray50", lwd = 1)
    
    # Add legend
    legend(
      "topright",
      legend = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not Significant"),
      col = c("#e74c3c", "#3498db", "#bdc3c7"),
      pch = 16,
      cex = 1
    )
  })
  
  # MA plot
  output$ma_plot <- renderPlot({
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    # Set colors
    colors <- ifelse(data$direction == "Upregulated", "#e74c3c",
                     ifelse(data$direction == "Downregulated", "#3498db", "#bdc3c7"))
    
    plot(
      log10(data$A + 1),
      data$log2FoldChange,
      col = colors,
      pch = 16,
      alpha = 0.5,
      main = paste(
        "MA Plot\n",
        "padj threshold:", input$padj_threshold,
        "| log2FC threshold:", input$lfc_threshold
      ),
      xlab = "log10(Gene Rank)",
      ylab = "log2(Fold Change)",
      cex.main = 1.2,
      cex.lab = 1.1,
      cex = 1.2
    )
    
    # Add threshold lines
    abline(h = 0, col = "gray50", lwd = 1)
    abline(h = c(-input$lfc_threshold, input$lfc_threshold), col = "blue", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
    
    # Add legend
    legend(
      "topright",
      legend = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not Significant"),
      col = c("#e74c3c", "#3498db", "#bdc3c7"),
      pch = 16,
      cex = 1
    )
  })
  
  # Summary statistics table
  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    upregulated <- sum(data$direction == "Upregulated")
    downregulated <- sum(data$direction == "Downregulated")
    not_sig <- sum(data$direction == "Not Significant")
    
    data.frame(
      Category = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not Significant", "Total"),
      Count = c(upregulated, downregulated, not_sig, nrow(data)),
      Mean_log2FC = c(
        round(mean(data$log2FoldChange[data$direction == "Upregulated"]), 3),
        round(mean(data$log2FoldChange[data$direction == "Downregulated"]), 3),
        round(mean(data$log2FoldChange[data$direction == "Not Significant"]), 3),
        round(mean(data$log2FoldChange), 3)
      )
    )
  }, striped = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)
  
  # Summary text
  output$summary_text <- renderText({
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    upregulated <- sum(data$direction == "Upregulated")
    downregulated <- sum(data$direction == "Downregulated")
    sig_count <- upregulated + downregulated
    
    paste0(
      "Total genes analyzed: 2000\n\n",
      "Genes meeting thresholds:\n",
      "Upregulated: ", upregulated, "\n",
      "Downregulated: ", downregulated, "\n",
      "Total significant: ", sig_count
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

## Overview

This interactive report provides an exploratory analysis of the airway RNA-seq dataset from @himes_rna-seq_2014. Use the controls in the sidebar to adjust the significance thresholds and explore how genes are classified as differentially expressed.

**Features:**
- **Volcano Plot**: Visualize log2 fold-change vs. adjusted p-value with customizable thresholds
- **MA Plot**: View expression levels (rank-based) vs. fold-change relationships  
- **Dynamic Summary**: See gene counts and statistics update in real-time as you adjust filters

**How to Use:**
1. Adjust the "Adjusted p-value threshold" slider to change the significance cutoff
2. Adjust the "Log2 Fold-Change threshold" to control the magnitude of expression change
3. Explore the different tabs to see volcano plots, MA plots, and summary statistics
4. Red points indicate upregulated genes, blue points indicate downregulated genes, gray points are not significant

## References

This analysis is based on the RNA-seq dataset and methods described in @himes_rna-seq_2014.
